---
title: "Course Info"
---

## Sections and meeting times

Mondays and Wednesdays, Fall-1 2026 (September 2 – October 14).

| Section | Time | Room |
|:--------|:-----|:-----|
| 01 | 1:00 – 2:20 pm | — |
| 02 | 2:35 – 3:55 pm | — |
| G1 | 4:10 – 5:30 pm | — |

: {tbl-colwidths="[20,45,35]"}

Room assignments will be posted here before the first class.

**One timeline:** All deliverables are due at **1:00 pm** — the start of the first section — regardless of which section you attend.

**Friday, September 4:** CFO Toolkit Bootcamp — required Monday-makeup class (no classes Labor Day, Monday September 7).

## Instructor

**Professor John M. Barrios**  
Yale School of Management

**Office hours:** posted here before the first class.

## Teaching assistant

To be announced.

## Canvas

All graded submissions, licensed cases, problem sets, and polls are on [Canvas](https://canvas.yale.edu).

## Policies

### Participation (45 points)

Based on in-class contribution (especially case discussions), attendance, and short pre-class Canvas polls (~15 of the 45 points). Name tents are required. Polls are graded for completion, not correctness.

### Laptop and tablet use

Tablets are permitted for notes and following lecture materials. Laptops may be used only in the back rows, with one exception: **Monday, September 28** — AI-assisted forecasting workshop; laptops with Excel required throughout the room.

### Use of AI

AI tools are **required** on Problem Set 2 and welcome as study aids. Every number you submit must be yours — if you cannot reproduce and defend it, do not submit it. The final exam is closed book and tests this material **without AI**.

### Final exam

Closed book; one handwritten cheat sheet (8.5×11, double-sided). Fall-1 examination period: **October 19–23**.

---

## FAQ

**Where do I submit assignments?**  
Canvas. Always Canvas for graded work.

**Which section's deadline applies?**  
1:00 pm for everyone — the first section's start time.

**Can I attend a different section for one day?**  
Coordinate with the instructor; deliverable deadlines do not change.

**Where are the slides?**  
On the [Materials](materials.qmd) page after each class day.

**Where is the HBS Feedburner case?**  
HBS coursepack / Canvas — not on this public site (licensed).

**Where is the Solstice case packet?**  
Canvas — distributed Monday, September 21.

**Do I need a paid AI subscription for PS2?**  
No. Free tier is sufficient; one working login per group of 3–4 is enough.
